_note: The Palatinate -> House of Hanover branch, ~1610-1714, descending from Elizabeth Stuart (the 'Winter Queen', ST_ELIZABETH, created in 09a_stuarts.json which loads before this file). Her marriage to Frederick V, Elector Palatine, produced the line that, via the Act of Settlement 1701, carried the British crown to the House of Hanover. George I (acceded 1714) and George II are the two Hanoverian monarchs of Great Britain in this file. Line stops at Frederick, Prince of Wales (father of the future George III). Union dot = marriage. Standard, well-documented royal genealogy.

families.note: Elizabeth Stuart & Frederick V, Elector Palatine -> Charles I Louis, Prince Rupert, Sophia of Hanover

1630-1714 · heiress presumptive to the British throne (Act of Settlement 1701)
